\caption{Normalized context-cost proxy terms and deterministic value sources. The archived formula is $task\_cost\_est = rhu\_h / \max(measured\_requests, 1) + 0.0 + c\_llm\_in \times avg\_retrieved\_input\_tokens$, with $c\_llm\_in=0.15$ in the resolved run configs and metadata; it is not a cloud-dollar estimate.}
\label{tab:cost-formula}
\resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{%
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\toprule
Term & Meaning & Unit & Value source \\
\midrule
C\_retrieval & Per-query retrieval cost estimate & project-defined normalized cost & retrieval\_cost\_est = rhu\_h / max(measured\_requests, 1) \\
C\_embedding & Per-query embedding cost estimate & project-defined normalized cost & embedding\_cost\_est = 0.0 for archived offline local embeddings \\
c\_llm\_in & Input-token cost coefficient & project-defined normalized cost per token & 0.15 from RunConfig.c\_llm\_in \\
Nretrieved\_input\_tokens & Retrieved context tokens packed downstream & tokens/query & avg\_retrieved\_input\_tokens measured from top-k outputs \\
task\_cost\_est & C\_retrieval + C\_embedding + c\_llm\_in x Nretrieved\_input\_tokens & normalized context-cost/query & retrieval\_cost\_est + embedding\_cost\_est + llm\_context\_cost\_est \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}
